problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: If Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
